data.name: ConfirmationCodeMessageInOneMinute
data.value: You cannot receive more than one confirmation code in one minute.

data.name: NotEmpty
data.value: Do not leave this field blank.

data.name: ElasticIndexlemeIslemiBasladi
data.value: Started process.

data.name: ValidNameMessage
data.value: Please enter a valid fullname.

data.name: ValidEmailMessage
data.value: Please enter valid mail.

data.name: ValidMailOrTelephoneMessage
data.value: Please enter a valid email address or phone number.

data.name: ValidTelephoneMessage
data.value: Please enter valid phone number.

data.name: FeedbackSend
data.value: Your feedback has been sent. Thank you!

data.name: FeedbackNotSend
data.value: Feedback could not be sent.

data.name: UserNotFoundEnteredMail
data.value: No user found for the email address you entered.

data.name: RegisteredUserEnteredMail
data.value: The email address you entered is already registered in our system. Please enter a different email address or log in to your existing account.

data.name: BusinessNotFoundEnteredMail
data.value: No business found for the email address you entered.

data.name: UserFoundEnteredTelephone
data.value: A user with the entered phone number is already registered in the system.

data.name: BusinessFoundEnteredTelephone
data.value: A business with the entered phone number is already registered in the system.

data.name: UserNotFoundEnteredInfo
data.value: No user found for the entered information.

data.name: BusinessNotFoundEnteredInfo
data.value: No business found for the entered information.

data.name: LoginSuccess
data.value: Login successful.

data.name: LoginFailed
data.value: Login failed.

data.name: RecordNotUpdated
data.value: The update could not be completed.

data.name: CurrentPasswordNotCorrectly
data.value: Please enter your current password correctly.

data.name: Weekday
data.value: weekdays

data.name: Weekend
data.value: weekend

data.name: IdErrorMessage
data.value: The request could not be processed because a valid ID was not provided.

data.name: Sale
data.value: {0}% off

data.name: RegistrationSuccess
data.value: Your registration has been successfully completed.

data.name: RecordNotFound
data.value: No record found.

data.name: RecordDeleted
data.value: The record has been successfully deleted.

data.name: RecordNotDeleted
data.value: The record could not be deleted.

data.name: RegistrationFailed
data.value: Registration failed.

data.name: RecordExists
data.value: The record for {0} already exists.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: ConfirmationCodeNotVerified
data.value: Confirmation code could not be verified.

data.name: ConfirmationCodeVerified
data.value: Confirmation code verified.

data.name: ConfirmationCodeSend
data.value: Confirmation code sent.

data.name: ConfirmationCodeNotSend
data.value: The confirmation code could not be sent.

data.name: ConfirmationCodeExpired
data.value: The confirmation code has expired. Please request a new code.

data.name: ConfirmationMessage
data.value: Welcome to CareGarden! Confirmation Code : {0}

data.name: PopularServices
data.value: Popular Services

data.name: AppointmentCancelWarning
data.value: Cancelling the appointment 9 hours before it may reduce your reliability. Do you want to proceed with the cancellation?

data.name: ColorCodeErrorMessage
data.value: The color code must be 3 or 6 digits.

data.name: ImageUploaded
data.value: Image uploaded successfully.

data.name: PasswordMustBeEightCharacters
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: PasswordsMustBeEqual
data.value: The entered passwords do not match.

data.name: ResetPassword
data.value: Password Reset

data.name: ResetPasswordSuccess
data.value: Password reset successful.

data.name: ResetPasswordFailed
data.value: Password reset failed.

data.name: ResetPasswordMailMessage
data.value: Confirmation code for password reset {0}.

data.name: ResetPasswordMessage
data.value: If you have forgotten your password, you can reset it using the 'Forgot Password' option.

data.name: BusinessNotFound
data.value: Business not found.

data.name: NotPermission
data.value: You do not have the necessary permissions to perform this action. Please contact your system administrator for the required permissions.

data.name: AppointmentAvailable
data.value: An appointment could not be scheduled for the selected date as it is already booked. Please choose another date and try again.

data.name: Anonymous
data.value: Anonymous

data.name: ConfirmationCodeForAppointment
data.value: Confirmation code {0} to complete the appointment.

data.name: BusinessNotVerified
data.value: Business could not be verified.

data.name: BusinessVerified
data.value: Business verified.

data.name: AppointmentCancelled
data.value: The appointment has been successfully cancelled.

data.name: AppointmentNotCancelled
data.value: There was an error cancelling the appointment.

data.name: AppointmentStatusChanged
data.value: The status of the appointment has been successfully updated.

data.name: AppointmentStatusNotChanged
data.value: There was an error updating the status of the appointment

data.name: ErrorContactMessage
data.value: Please try again later or contact our support team.

data.name: ErrorMessage
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: ImageNotUploaded
data.value: There was an error uploading the image.

data.name: RecordUpdated
data.value: The update process has been successfully completed.

data.name: BusinessFoundEnteredMail
data.value: A business is registered with the email address you entered.

data.name: UserFoundEnteredMail
data.value: A user is registered with the email address you entered.

data.name: AllMessagesRead
data.value: All messages have been marked as read.

data.name: RecordsDeleted
data.value: The records has been successfully deleted.

data.name: RecordsNotDeleted
data.value: The records could not be deleted.

data.name: LocationNotUpdated
data.value: There was an error updating your location information.

data.name: LocationUpdated
data.value: Your location information has been updated.

data.name: LoginFailedUserMessage
data.value: The email address or password you entered is incorrect

data.name: WorkerPriceErrorMessage
data.value: The employee-specific price cannot be higher than the service price.

data.name: PasswordResetLinkExpired
data.value: The password reset link has expired. Please request a password reset link.

data.name: PasswordResetLinkMessage
data.value: To continue with your password reset process, please click here.

data.name: PasswordResetLinkMessageInOneHour
data.value: You cannot request more than one password reset link within an hour.

data.name: PasswordResetLinkNotFound
data.value: Such a link could not be found.

data.name: PasswordResetLinkNotSend
data.value: Password reset link could not be sent.

data.name: PasswordResetLinkSend
data.value: Password reset link sent.

data.name: StartDateNotBiggerEndDate
data.value: The start date cannot be later than the end date.

data.name: DateMaxRangeError
data.value: The date range must not exceed one month.

data.name: OpenAIRequestNotSend
data.value: AI request could not be sent.

data.name: OpenAIRequestSend
data.value: AI request sent.

data.name: OpenAIRequestLimitMessage
data.value: You have reached the maximum request limit for skin analysis. Please contact us for further analysis

data.name: AddFavorite
data.value: Added to favorites

data.name: DeleteFavorite
data.value: Deleted to favorites.
